<div data-cms-block="storefront/product-info" data-attrs=""></div>

![Snake Plant](24-snake-plant.jpg)

If you've killed every plant you've owned, start here. Sansevieria tolerates low light, infrequent watering, and a wide temperature range. NASA's air-purifying study put it in the top five.

## What's in it

- Sansevieria trifasciata, multiple shoots
- Care card

## Care

Water once every 2–3 weeks. In winter, once a month is enough. Anything more and you'll rot the roots.
